summary: A business app for a construction company. Core purpose and features are still being defined.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Bold construction company logo mark with a hard hat and wrench icon on a dark charcoal background with amber accent color (logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Wide dashboard hero banner featuring a construction site skyline silhouette with crane, warm amber and charcoal gradient sky (hero-banner.dim_1200x300.png)

existing_features.title: Create a dashboard home screen that displays a summary of active projects, upcoming tasks, and key business metrics (e.g., total projects, completed projects, pending tasks).

Implement project management: allow users to create, view, edit, and delete construction projects. Each project should have a name, description, status (Planning / In Progress / Completed), start date, end date, and budget.
Implement task management within each project: allow users to add, edit, complete, and delete tasks. Each task should have a title, assignee name, due date, and status (To Do / In Progress / Done).
Implement a client directory: allow users to add, view, edit, and delete client records. Each client should have a name, phone number, email, and associated projects.

Apply a bold, industrial visual theme inspired by construction: use a dark charcoal and warm amber/orange color palette, strong typography with clear hierarchy, card-based layouts for projects and tasks, and a persistent left sidebar navigation with icons for Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, and Clients. Enforce this style consistently across all pages.
Render the generated logo and hero banner images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and display them in the app header/dashboard.
